title: evolvulus arenicola
intro: Evolvulus arenicola is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae, commonly known as dwarf blue daze or evolvulus. It is native to the coastal regions of the southeastern United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic qualities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, skin infections, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, evolvulus arenicola is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
